description: Example Ralph backlog showing AFK/HITL story metadata and dependencies.

userStories.title: Create storage shape
userStories.description: As a maintainer, I want the feature storage shape defined so that later behavior has a stable base.
acceptanceCriteria: Storage shape is represented in the relevant schema or model

userStories.title: Add user-facing behavior
userStories.description: As a user, I want the new behavior to use the stored data so that I can complete the workflow.
acceptanceCriteria: The behavior is available through the public interface
The behavior respects the storage shape from US-001

userStories.title: Choose launch wording
userStories.description: As a product owner, I want to choose the final wording so that the feature matches the intended tone.
acceptanceCriteria: Final wording is approved by a human
